ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., Journal Article, Book Chapter) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of keywords */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the publication was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the publication */,
  "published_in" TEXT /* Journal or conference name where the publication was published */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the research */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., observational, experimental) */,
  "data_availability" TEXT /* Availability of data (e.g., publicly available, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the author's research interests */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the author's areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology (e.g., Wind Energy, Wave Energy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the technology (e.g., offshore, onshore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stressors" (
  "stressor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stressor */,
  "stressor_name" TEXT /* Name of the stressor (e.g., Habitat Change, Changes in Flow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stressor */,
  "impact_category" TEXT /* Category of impact (e.g., environmental, socio-economic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stressor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receptors" (
  "receptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receptor */,
  "receptor_name" TEXT /* Name of the receptor (e.g., Invertebrates, Human Dimensions, Climate Change) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the receptor */,
  "affected_group" TEXT /* Affected group (e.g., marine life, human communities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_authors" (
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author-publication relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_authors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_technologies" (
  "pt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology-publication relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_technologies_technology_id FOREIGN KEY ("technology_id") REFERENCES technologies ("technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_technologies_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_stressors" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stressor-publication relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "stressor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stressor */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_stressors_stressor_id FOREIGN KEY ("stressor_id") REFERENCES stressors ("stressor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_stressors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_receptors" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receptor-publication relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "receptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receptor */,
  "affected_level" TEXT /* Level of affectedness (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_receptors_receptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("receptor_id") REFERENCES receptors ("receptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_receptors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the team is affiliated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_teams" (
  "pt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-publication relationship */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_teams_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
